312: # Generate slug from task message (first # title line only)
313: _task_slug() {
314:   local text="$1"
315:   # Extract first # heading as title
316:   local title
317:   title=$(echo "$text" | grep -m1 '^# ' | sed 's/^# //')
318:   if [[ -z "$title" ]]; then
319:     # Fallback: first non-empty line
320:     title=$(echo "$text" | grep -m1 '[^ ]')
321:   fi
322:   local slug
323:   slug=$(echo "$title" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//' | cut -c1-50)
324:   # If slug is empty (non-ASCII title), use task file basename
325:   if [[ -z "$slug" && -n "$TASK_FILE" ]]; then
326:     slug=$(basename "$TASK_FILE" .md)
327:   fi
328:   # Ultimate fallback
329:   if [[ -z "$slug" ]]; then
330:     slug="task-$(date +%s)"
331:   fi
332:   echo "$slug"
333: }
334: 
335: # ── Task file lifecycle (Foundry task root integration) ─────────────
336: # When --task-file points to tasks/<slug>--foundry/task.md, manage its lifecycle
337: # so the Foundry monitor can track progress in real time.
338: TASK_LIFECYCLE=false
339: TASK_ACTIVE_FILE=""
340: TASKS_DIR=""
341: TASK_DIR=""
342: 
343: _detect_task_lifecycle() {
344:   if [[ -n "$TASK_FILE" ]]; then
345:     local task_dir=""
346:     task_dir=$(foundry_task_dir_from_file "$TASK_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
347:     if [[ -n "$task_dir" ]]; then
348:       TASK_LIFECYCLE=true
349:       TASK_DIR="$task_dir"
350:       TASKS_DIR="$PIPELINE_TASKS_ROOT"
351:       TASK_FILE="$task_dir/task.md"
352:     fi
353:   else
354:     local slug
355:     slug=$(_task_slug "$TASK_MESSAGE")
356:     TASK_DIR=$(foundry_task_dir_for_slug "$slug" || true)
357:     if [[ -z "$TASK_DIR" ]]; then
358:       TASK_DIR=$(foundry_create_task_dir "$TASK_MESSAGE" "$slug")
359:     fi
360:     TASK_FILE="$(foundry_task_file "$TASK_DIR")"
361:     TASK_LIFECYCLE=true
362:     TASKS_DIR="$PIPELINE_TASKS_ROOT"
363:     foundry_set_state_status "$TASK_DIR" "pending" "" ""
364:     pipeline_task_append_event "$TASK_DIR" "task_created" "Foundry task initialized"
365:   fi
366: }
367: 
368: _task_move_to_in_progress() {
369:   [[ "$TASK_LIFECYCLE" != true ]] && return
370:   TASK_ACTIVE_FILE="$TASK_FILE"
371: 
372:   # Safe Start Protocol: Run preflight checks before transitioning to in_progress
373:   if [[ -f "$REPO_ROOT/agentic-development/lib/foundry-preflight.sh" ]]; then
374:     # shellcheck source=/dev/null
375:     source "$REPO_ROOT/agentic-development/lib/foundry-preflight.sh"
376: 
377:     echo -e "${BOLD}Running Safe Start preflight checks...${NC}"
378:     if ! foundry_preflight_check "$TASK_DIR" "default"; then
379:       echo -e "${RED}✗ Preflight checks failed - task stopped${NC}"
380:       local stop_reason
381:       stop_reason=$(foundry_state_field "$TASK_DIR" stop_reason 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
382:       echo -e "${YELLOW}  Stop reason: $stop_reason${NC}"
383:       echo -e "${YELLOW}  See handoff.md for recovery instructions${NC}"
384:       echo -e "${YELLOW}  Resume with: ./agentic-development/foundry.sh resume $(basename "$TASK_DIR")${NC}"
385:       exit 1
386:     fi
387:     echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Preflight checks passed${NC}"
388:   fi
389: 
390:   foundry_set_state_status "$TASK_DIR" "in_progress" "${FROM_AGENT:-u-planner}" "${FROM_AGENT:-u-planner}"
391:   pipeline_task_append_event "$TASK_DIR" "run_started" "Foundry run started" "${FROM_AGENT:-u-planner}"
392:   echo -e "${BLUE}Task state: pending → in_progress${NC}"
393: }
394: 
395: _task_move_to_done() {
396:   [[ "$TASK_LIFECYCLE" != true ]] && return
397:   local branch="${1:-}"
398:   foundry_set_state_status "$TASK_DIR" "completed" "" ""
399:   [[ -n "$branch" ]] && foundry_update_state_field "$TASK_DIR" "branch" "$branch"
400:   pipeline_task_append_event "$TASK_DIR" "run_completed" "Foundry run completed" "u-summarizer"
401:   echo -e "${GREEN}Task state: in_progress → completed${NC}"
402: }
403: 
404: _task_move_to_failed() {
405:   [[ "$TASK_LIFECYCLE" != true ]] && return
406:   local branch="${1:-}"
407:   foundry_set_state_status "$TASK_DIR" "failed" "${failed_agent:-unknown}" "${failed_agent:-u-coder}"
408:   [[ -n "$branch" ]] && foundry_update_state_field "$TASK_DIR" "branch" "$branch"
409:   pipeline_task_append_event "$TASK_DIR" "run_failed" "Foundry run failed at ${failed_agent:-unknown}" "${failed_agent:-unknown}"
410:   echo -e "${RED}Task state: in_progress → failed${NC}"
411: }
412: 
413: _detect_task_lifecycle
414: 
415: TASK_SLUG=""
416: if [[ -n "$TASK_DIR" ]]; then
417:   TASK_SLUG=$(foundry_task_slug_from_dir "$TASK_DIR")
418: fi
419: 
420: _is_autotest_task() {
421:   [[ "$TASK_MESSAGE" == *"<!-- source: autotest -->"* || "$TASK_MESSAGE" == *$'\n# Admin created task '* || "$TASK_MESSAGE" == "# Admin created task "* ]]
422: }
423: 
424: _skip_autotest_task() {
425:   echo -e "${YELLOW}Autotest task detected — skipping pipeline and marking as done.${NC}"
426:   _task_move_to_in_progress
427:   _task_move_to_done "autotest/skipped" "0"
428:   exit 0
429: }
430: 
431: if _is_autotest_task; then
432:   _skip_autotest_task
433: fi
434: 
435: # ── Pre-flight checks ────────────────────────────────────────────────
436: 
437: preflight() {
438:   echo -e "${BOLD}Pre-flight checks...${NC}"
439:   local errors=0
440: 
441:   # 1. opencode CLI
442:   if ! command -v opencode &>/dev/null; then
443:     echo -e "  ${RED}✗ opencode CLI not found${NC}"
444:     errors=$((errors + 1))
445:   else
446:     echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ opencode $(opencode --version 2>/dev/null)${NC}"
447:   fi
448: 
449:   # 2. Docker daemon (optional - only required for tests)
450:   if ! command -v docker &>/dev/null; then
451:     echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Docker not installed (tests will be skipped)${NC}"
452:   elif ! docker info &>/dev/null; then
453:     echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Docker daemon not running (tests will be skipped)${NC}"
454:   else
455:     echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Docker daemon${NC}"
456:   fi
457: 
458:   # 3. Key services (postgres, redis)
459:   if docker info &>/dev/null; then
460:     if docker compose -f "$REPO_ROOT/compose.yaml" ps --format json 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"running"'; then
461:       echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Docker stack running${NC}"
462: 
463:       # Postgres connectivity
464:       if docker compose -f "$REPO_ROOT/compose.yaml" exec -T postgres pg_isready -q 2>/dev/null; then
465:         echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Postgres accepting connections${NC}"
466:       else
467:         echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Postgres not ready (tests may fail)${NC}"
468:       fi
469:     else
470:       echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Docker stack may not be running (run 'make up' first)${NC}"
471:     fi
472:   fi
473: 
474:   # 4. Git state
475:   if ! git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
476:     echo -e "  ${RED}✗ Not a git repository${NC}"
477:     errors=$((errors + 1))
478:   else
479:     if [[ -n "$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
480:       echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Git working tree has uncommitted changes${NC}"
481:       # Block if openspec/ files have uncommitted changes (P1 sync guard)
482:       local openspec_dirty
483:       openspec_dirty=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" status --porcelain -- openspec/ 2>/dev/null || true)
484:       if [[ -n "$openspec_dirty" ]]; then
485:         echo -e "  ${RED}✗ openspec/ has uncommitted changes — commit them first${NC}"
486:         echo -e "  ${RED}  Pipeline branches from HEAD; uncommitted specs won't be included${NC}"
487:         echo "$openspec_dirty" | while IFS= read -r line; do
488:           echo -e "    ${RED}${line}${NC}"
489:         done
490:         errors=$((errors + 1))
491:       fi
492:     else
493:       echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Git working tree clean${NC}"
494:     fi
495:   fi
496: 
497:   # 5. Required tools
498:   for cmd in timeout jq; do
499:     if command -v "$cmd" &>/dev/null; then
500:       echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ ${cmd}${NC}"
501:     else
502:       echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ ${cmd} not found (some features disabled)${NC}"
503:     fi
504:   done
505: 
506:   echo ""
507: 
508:   if [[ $errors -gt 0 ]]; then
509:     echo -e "${RED}Pre-flight failed with ${errors} error(s). Aborting.${NC}"
510:     exit 1
511:   fi
512: }
513: 
514: # ── Environment check ────────────────────────────────────────────────
515: 
516: env_check() {
517:   if [[ "$SKIP_ENV_CHECK" == true ]]; then
518:     echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ Environment check skipped (--skip-env-check)${NC}"
519:     return 0
520:   fi
521: 
522:   local env_check_script="$REPO_ROOT/agentic-development/lib/env-check.sh"
523:   if [[ ! -x "$env_check_script" ]]; then
524:     echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ env-check.sh not found or not executable — skipping environment check${NC}"
525:     return 0
526:   fi
527: 
528:   echo -e "${BOLD}Environment check...${NC}"
529: 
530:   # Build --app flags from task context (detect apps mentioned in task message)
531:   local app_flags=()
532:   local task_lower
533:   task_lower=$(echo "$TASK_MESSAGE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
534:   [[ "$task_lower" == *"core"* ]]               && app_flags+=("--app" "core")
535:   [[ "$task_lower" == *"knowledge"* ]]           && app_flags+=("--app" "knowledge-agent")
536:   [[ "$task_lower" == *"dev-reporter"* ]]        && app_flags+=("--app" "dev-reporter-agent")
537:   [[ "$task_lower" == *"news-maker"* || "$task_lower" == *"news_maker"* ]] && app_flags+=("--app" "news-maker-agent")
538:   [[ "$task_lower" == *"wiki"* ]]                && app_flags+=("--app" "wiki-agent")
539: 
540:   local env_report_file="$PIPELINE_DIR/env-report.json"
541:   local env_exit_code=0
542: 
543:   "$env_check_script" "${app_flags[@]+"${app_flags[@]}"}" \
544:     --report-file "$env_report_file" \
545:     2>&1 || env_exit_code=$?
546: 
547:   if [[ $env_exit_code -eq 2 ]]; then
548:     # Fatal: cancel pipeline
549:     emit_event "ENV_FATAL" "report=${env_report_file}"
550:     echo -e "${RED}${BOLD}Environment check FATAL — pipeline cancelled.${NC}"
551:     echo -e "${RED}Fix the issues above and retry.${NC}"
552:     send_telegram "🔴 <b>ENV_FATAL: Pipeline cancelled</b>
553: 📋 <i>${TASK_MESSAGE}</i>
554: ⚠️ Fatal environment prerequisites missing. Check env-report.json."
555:     _task_move_to_failed "env-fatal" "0"
556:     exit 3
557:   elif [[ $env_exit_code -eq 1 ]]; then
558:     # Warnings: continue but note in handoff
559:     emit_event "ENV_WARN" "report=${env_report_file}"
560:     echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ Environment warnings detected — pipeline continues with degraded capability.${NC}"
561:     # Write warnings to handoff if it exists
562:     if [[ -f "$HANDOFF_FILE" ]]; then
563:       {
564:         echo ""
565:         echo "## Environment"
566:         echo ""
567:         echo "- **Status**: warnings (exit 1)"
568:         echo "- **Report**: ${env_report_file}"
569:         if command -v jq &>/dev/null && [[ -f "$env_report_file" ]]; then
570:           echo "- **Summary**: $(jq -r '.summary // "unknown"' "$env_report_file" 2>/dev/null)"
571:           echo "- **Warnings**:"
572:           jq -r '.checks[] | select(.status == "warn") | "  - \(.name): \(.detail)"' "$env_report_file" 2>/dev/null || true
573:         fi
574:       } >> "$HANDOFF_FILE"
575:     fi
576:   else
577:     # All pass: write env versions to handoff
578:     emit_event "ENV_PASS" "report=${env_report_file}"
579:     if [[ -f "$HANDOFF_FILE" ]]; then
580:       {
581:         echo ""
582:         echo "## Environment"
583:         echo ""
584:         echo "- **Status**: pass"
585:         echo "- **Report**: ${env_report_file}"
586:         if command -v jq &>/dev/null && [[ -f "$env_report_file" ]]; then
587:           echo "- **Summary**: $(jq -r '.summary // "unknown"' "$env_report_file" 2>/dev/null)"
588:           echo "- **Versions**:"
589:           jq -r '.environment | to_entries[] | select(.value != "") | "  - \(.key): \(.value)"' "$env_report_file" 2>/dev/null || true
590:         fi
591:       } >> "$HANDOFF_FILE"
592:     fi
593:   fi
594: }
595: 
596: # ── Setup directories ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
597: 
598: mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR" "$REPORT_DIR"
599: 
600: # ── Determine which agents to run ─────────────────────────────────────
601: 
602: get_agents_to_run() {
603:   local agent_list=("${AGENTS[@]}")
604: 
605:   # Add auditor if enabled and not already present. Keep it after coder.
606:   if [[ "$ENABLE_AUDIT" == true ]]; then
607:     local has_auditor=false
608:     local new_list=()
609:     for agent in "${agent_list[@]}"; do
610:       [[ "$agent" == "u-auditor" ]] && has_auditor=true
611:     done
612:     if [[ "$has_auditor" != true ]]; then
613:       for agent in "${agent_list[@]}"; do
614:         new_list+=("$agent")
615:         if [[ "$agent" == "u-coder" ]]; then
616:           new_list+=("u-auditor")
617:         fi
618:       done
619:       agent_list=("${new_list[@]}")
620:     fi
621:   fi
622: 
623:   if [[ -n "$ONLY_AGENT" ]]; then
624:     echo "$ONLY_AGENT"
625:     return
626:   fi
627: 
628:   local has_summarizer=false
629:   for agent in "${agent_list[@]}"; do
630:     [[ "$agent" == "u-summarizer" ]] && has_summarizer=true
631:   done
632:   if [[ "$has_summarizer" != true ]]; then
633:     agent_list+=("u-summarizer")
634:   fi
635: 
636:   local started=false
637:   for agent in "${agent_list[@]}"; do
638:     if [[ -n "$FROM_AGENT" ]]; then
639:       if [[ "$agent" == "$FROM_AGENT" ]]; then
640:         started=true
641:       fi
642:       if ! $started; then
643:         continue
644:       fi
645:     fi
646: 
647:     if [[ "$SKIP_ARCHITECT" == true && "$agent" == "u-architect" ]]; then
648:       continue
649:     fi
650: 
651:     echo "$agent"
652:   done
653: }
654: 
655: # ── Git branch setup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
656: 
657: setup_branch() {
658:   if [[ -n "$BRANCH_NAME" ]]; then
659:     echo "$BRANCH_NAME"
660:   else
661:     local slug="${TASK_SLUG:-$(_task_slug "$TASK_MESSAGE")}"
662:     echo "pipeline/${slug}"
663:   fi
664: }
665: 
666: # ── Get timeout for agent ─────────────────────────────────────────────
667: 
668: get_timeout() {
669:   local agent="$1"
670:   # Strip u-/s- prefix for timeout var lookup (u-architect → ARCHITECT)
671:   local base_name="${agent#u-}"
672:   base_name="${base_name#s-}"
673:   local var_name="PIPELINE_TIMEOUT_$(echo "$base_name" | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]' | tr '-' '_')"
674:   echo "${!var_name:-1800}"
675: }
676: 
677: # ── Commit agent work ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
678: 
679: commit_agent_work() {
680:   local agent="$1"
681:   local task_slug="$2"
682: 
683:   if [[ "$NO_COMMIT" == true ]]; then
684:     return 0
685:   fi
686: 
687:   # Check if there are changes to commit
688:   if git -C "$REPO_ROOT" diff --quiet && git -C "$REPO_ROOT" diff --cached --quiet && [[ -z "$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]]; then
689:     echo -e "  ${BLUE}No changes to commit after ${agent}${NC}"
690:     return 0
691:   fi
692: 
693:   git -C "$REPO_ROOT" add -A
694:   if [[ -n "${TASK_DIR:-}" ]]; then
695:     git -C "$REPO_ROOT" add -f "${TASK_DIR#"$REPO_ROOT"/}/summary.md" 2>/dev/null || true
696:     git -C "$REPO_ROOT" add -f "${TASK_DIR#"$REPO_ROOT"/}/state.json" 2>/dev/null || true
697:     git -C "$REPO_ROOT" add -f "${TASK_DIR#"$REPO_ROOT"/}/handoff.md" 2>/dev/null || true
698:     git -C "$REPO_ROOT" add -f "${TASK_DIR#"$REPO_ROOT"/}/meta.json" 2>/dev/null || true
699:     git -C "$REPO_ROOT" add -f "${TASK_DIR#"$REPO_ROOT"/}/events.jsonl" 2>/dev/null || true
700:   fi
701:   local commit_msg="[pipeline:${agent}] ${task_slug}"
702: 
703:   if git -C "$REPO_ROOT" commit -m "$commit_msg" --no-verify 2>/dev/null; then
704:     local hash
705:     hash=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --short HEAD)
706:     echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Committed: ${hash} — ${commit_msg}${NC}"
707: 
708:     # Update handoff with commit hash
709:     if [[ -f "$HANDOFF_FILE" ]]; then
710:       # Append commit info to the agent's section
711:       echo "- **Commit (${agent})**: ${hash}" >> "$HANDOFF_FILE"
712:     fi
713:     return 0
714:   else
715:     echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Commit failed (may have no changes)${NC}"
716:     return 0
717:   fi
718: }
719: 
720: # ── Checkpoint & Artifacts ────────────────────────────────────────────
721: #
722: # Each task gets an artifacts directory inside tasks/<slug>--foundry/artifacts/
723: # Inside:
724: #   checkpoint.json  — tracks which agents completed successfully
725: #   <agent>/         — agent-specific artifacts (logs, proposals, etc.)
726: #
727: # checkpoint.json format:
728: # {
729: #   "task": "...", "branch": "...", "started": "...",
730: #   "agents": {
731: #     "architect": {"status":"done","duration":123,"commit":"abc1234"},
732: #     "coder": {"status":"done","duration":456,"commit":"def5678"}
733: #   }
734: # }
735: 
736: ARTIFACTS_BASE="$FOUNDRY_TASK_ROOT"
737: 
738: # Initialize artifacts directory for a task
739: init_artifacts() {
740:   local slug="$1"
741:   local branch="$2"
742:   if [[ -z "$TASK_DIR" ]]; then
743:     TASK_DIR=$(foundry_task_dir_for_slug "$slug" || true)
744:   fi
745:   if [[ -z "$TASK_DIR" ]]; then
746:     TASK_DIR=$(foundry_create_task_dir "$TASK_MESSAGE" "$slug")
747:     TASK_FILE="$(foundry_task_file "$TASK_DIR")"
748:     TASK_LIFECYCLE=true
749:   fi
750:   ARTIFACTS_DIR="$(foundry_artifacts_dir "$TASK_DIR")"
751:   CHECKPOINT_FILE="$(foundry_checkpoint_file "$TASK_DIR")"
752:   TELEMETRY_DIR="$(foundry_telemetry_dir "$TASK_DIR")"
753:   TASK_SUMMARY_DIR="$TASK_DIR"
754:   TASK_SUMMARY_FILE="$(foundry_summary_file "$TASK_DIR")"
755: 
756:   mkdir -p "$ARTIFACTS_DIR"
757:   mkdir -p "$TELEMETRY_DIR"
758:   mkdir -p "$TASK_SUMMARY_DIR"
759: 
760:   # Only create new checkpoint if not resuming
761:   if [[ "$RESUME_MODE" == true && -f "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" ]]; then
762:     echo -e "${BLUE}Resuming from checkpoint: ${CHECKPOINT_FILE}${NC}"
763:     return
764:   fi
765: 
766:   # Create fresh checkpoint
767:   cat > "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" << CHECKPOINT_EOF
768: {
769:   "task": $(printf '%s' "$TASK_MESSAGE" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))'),
770:   "branch": "$branch",
771:   "workflow": "foundry",
772:   "started": "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')",
773:   "agents": {}
774: }
775: CHECKPOINT_EOF
776:   foundry_update_state_field "$TASK_DIR" "branch" "$branch"
777: }
778: 
779: set_planned_agents() {
780:   [[ -f "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" ]] || return 0
781: 
782:   python3 - "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" "$@" <<'PYEOF'
783: import json, sys
784: cp_file = sys.argv[1]
785: planned = sys.argv[2:]
786: with open(cp_file, 'r') as f:
787:     data = json.load(f)
788: data['planned_agents'] = planned
789: with open(cp_file, 'w') as f:
790:     json.dump(data, f, indent=2)
791: PYEOF
792: }
793: 
794: # Write checkpoint after agent completes
795: write_checkpoint() {
796:   local agent="$1"
797:   local status="$2"
798:   local duration="$3"
799:   local commit_hash="${4:-}"
800:   local tokens_json="${5:-{}}"
801:   local actual_model="${6:-$(get_current_model "$agent" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")}"
802: 
803:   [[ -f "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" ]] || return 0
804: 
805:   # Use python3 to safely update JSON (stdin to avoid shell quoting issues)
806:   python3 - "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" "$agent" "$status" "$duration" "$commit_hash" "$tokens_json" "$actual_model" <<'PYEOF'
807: import json, sys
808: cp_file, agent, status, duration, commit, tokens_raw, model = sys.argv[1:8]
809: with open(cp_file, 'r') as f:
810:     data = json.load(f)
811: try:
812:     tokens = json.loads(tokens_raw) if tokens_raw != '{}' else {}
813: except json.JSONDecodeError:
814:     tokens = {}
815: from datetime import datetime
816: data['agents'][agent] = {
817:     'status': status,
818:     'model': model,
819:     'duration': int(duration),
820:     'commit': commit,
821:     'finished': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
822:     'tokens': tokens
823: }
824: with open(cp_file, 'w') as f:
825:     json.dump(data, f, indent=2)
826: PYEOF
827:   if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then
828:     echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ write_checkpoint failed for ${agent}${NC}" >&2
829:   fi
830: }
831: 
832: # Copy agent log to artifacts
833: save_agent_artifact() {
834:   local agent="$1"
835:   local log_file="$2"
836: 
837:   [[ -d "$ARTIFACTS_DIR" ]] || return 0
838: 
839:   local agent_dir="$ARTIFACTS_DIR/$agent"
840:   mkdir -p "$agent_dir"
841: 
842:   # Copy log file
843:   if [[ -f "$log_file" ]]; then
844:     cp "$log_file" "$agent_dir/$(basename "$log_file")"
845:   fi
846: 
847:   # Copy agent-created files (e.g., openspec proposals for architect)
848:   if [[ "$agent" == "u-architect" ]]; then
849:     # Copy any new openspec changes
850:     local changes_dir="$REPO_ROOT/openspec/changes"
851:     if [[ -d "$changes_dir" ]]; then
852:       for d in "$changes_dir"/*/; do
853:         [[ -d "$d" ]] || continue
854:         # Only copy recently modified proposals (last 30 min)
855:         if find "$d" -maxdepth 0 -mmin -30 -print -quit 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then
856:           cp -r "$d" "$agent_dir/" 2>/dev/null || true
857:         fi
858:       done
859:     fi
860:   elif [[ "$agent" == "u-summarizer" && -f "$TASK_SUMMARY_FILE" ]]; then
861:     cp "$TASK_SUMMARY_FILE" "$agent_dir/$(basename "$TASK_SUMMARY_FILE")" 2>/dev/null || true
862:   fi
863: }
864: 
865: # Read checkpoint and determine which agent to resume from
866: get_resume_agent() {
867:   [[ -f "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" ]] || return
868: 
869:   python3 - "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" <<'PYEOF' 2>/dev/null || true
870: import json, sys
871: with open(sys.argv[1], 'r') as f:
872:     data = json.load(f)
873: agents_order = data.get('planned_agents') or ['planner', 'architect', 'coder', 'auditor', 'validator', 'tester', 'e2e', 'documenter', 'summarizer']
874: completed = data.get('agents', {})
875: for agent in agents_order:
876:     info = completed.get(agent, {})
877:     if info.get('status') != 'done':
878:         print(agent)
879:         break
880: PYEOF
881: }
882: 
883: # Print checkpoint summary
884: print_checkpoint_summary() {
885:   [[ -f "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" ]] || return
886: 
887:   python3 - "$CHECKPOINT_FILE" <<'PYEOF' 2>/dev/null || true
888: import json, sys
889: with open(sys.argv[1], 'r') as f:
890:     data = json.load(f)
891: agents = data.get('agents', {})
892: if not agents:
893:     print('  (no completed agents)')
894:     exit()
895: for name, info in agents.items():
896:     status = info.get('status', '?')
897:     dur = info.get('duration', 0)
898:     commit = info.get('commit', '')
899:     icon = '✓' if status == 'done' else '✗'
900:     print(f'  {icon} {name}: {status} ({dur}s) {commit}')
901: PYEOF
902: }
903: 
904: # ── Dev Reporter Agent integration ───────────────────────────────────
905: 
906: send_report_to_agent() {
907:   local status="$1"
908:   local failed_agent="${2:-}"
909:   local total_duration="$3"
910: 
911:   local core_url="${PLATFORM_CORE_URL:-http://localhost:80}"
912: 
913:   local failed_agent_json="null"
914:   if [[ -n "$failed_agent" ]]; then
915:     failed_agent_json="\"${failed_agent}\""
916:   fi
917: 
918:   local payload
919:   payload=$(printf '{"intent":"devreporter.ingest","agent":"dev-reporter-agent","payload":{"pipeline_id":"%s","task":"%s","branch":"%s","status":"%s","failed_agent":%s,"duration_seconds":%s,"agent_results":[]}}' \
920:     "${TIMESTAMP}" \
921:     "${TASK_MESSAGE//\"/\\\"}" \
922:     "${branch//\"/\\\"}" \
923:     "${status}" \
924:     "${failed_agent_json}" \
925:     "${total_duration}")
926: 
927:   local response
928:   response=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" \
929:     -X POST "${core_url}/api/v1/a2a/send-message" \
930:     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
931:     -d "$payload" \
932:     --max-time 10 2>/dev/null) || response="000"
933: 
934:   if [[ "$response" == "200" || "$response" == "201" ]]; then
935:     echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓ Pipeline report sent to dev-reporter-agent${NC}"
936:   else
937:     echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Could not reach dev-reporter-agent (HTTP ${response}) — continuing${NC}"
938:   fi
939: }
940: 
941: # ── Telegram notifications ────────────────────────────────────────────
942: 
943: send_telegram() {
944:   if [[ "$TELEGRAM_NOTIFY" != true ]]; then
945:     return 0
946:   fi
947: 
948:   if [[ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" || -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]]; then
949:     echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Telegram: missing PIPELINE_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN or PIPELINE_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID${NC}"
950:     return 0
951:   fi
952: 
953:   local message="$1"
954:   curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" \
955:     -d chat_id="$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" \
956:     -d parse_mode="HTML" \
957:     -d text="$message" \
958:     -d disable_web_page_preview=true \
959:     &>/dev/null || echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Telegram notification failed${NC}"
960: }
961: 
962: # ── Run migrations if needed ──────────────────────────────────────────
963: 
964: run_migrations() {
965:   echo -e "  ${BLUE}Checking for new migrations...${NC}"
966: 
967:   local has_migrations=false
968: 
969:   # Check for PHP migrations (Doctrine)
970:   if git -C "$REPO_ROOT" diff --name-only HEAD~1 2>/dev/null | grep -qE 'migrations/Version'; then
971:     has_migrations=true
972: 
973:     # Determine which app has migrations
974:     if git -C "$REPO_ROOT" diff --name-only HEAD~1 | grep -q 'apps/brama-core/migrations'; then
975:       echo -e "  ${CYAN}Running core migrations...${NC}"
976:       (cd "$REPO_ROOT" && make migrate 2>&1) || echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Core migration warning${NC}"
977:     fi
978:     if git -C "$REPO_ROOT" diff --name-only HEAD~1 | grep -q 'apps/knowledge-agent/migrations'; then
979:       echo -e "  ${CYAN}Running knowledge-agent migrations...${NC}"
980:       (cd "$REPO_ROOT" && make knowledge-migrate 2>&1) || echo -e "  ${YELLOW}⚠ Knowledge migration warning${NC}"
981:     fi
982:     if git -C "$REPO_ROOT" diff --name-only HEAD~1 | grep -q 'apps/dev-reporter-agent/migrations'; then
983:       echo -e "  ${CYAN}Running dev-reporter-agent migrations...${NC}"

1002: get_fallback_chain() {
1003:   local agent="$1"
1004:   local base_name="${agent#u-}"
1005:   base_name="${base_name#u_}"
1006:   local var_name="FALLBACK_$(echo "$base_name" | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]')"
1007:   local chain="${!var_name:-}"
1008:   [[ -n "$chain" ]] || return 0
1009: 
1010:   local expanded=()
1011:   local token=""
1012:   local free_tokens=()
1013:   local cheap_tokens=()
1014:   IFS=',' read -r -a raw_tokens <<< "$chain"
1015:   for token in "${raw_tokens[@]}"; do
1016:     token="${token#"${token%%[![:space:]]*}"}"
1017:     token="${token%"${token##*[![:space:]]}"}"
1018:     case "$token" in
1019:       free)
1020:         IFS=',' read -r -a free_tokens <<< "$FREE_MODELS"
1021:         expanded+=("${free_tokens[@]}")
1022:         ;;
1023:       cheap)
1024:         IFS=',' read -r -a cheap_tokens <<< "$CHEAP_MODELS"
1025:         expanded+=("${cheap_tokens[@]}")
1026:         ;;
1027:       "")
1028:         ;;
1029:       *)
1030:         expanded+=("$token")
1031:         ;;
1032:     esac
1033:   done
1034: 
1035:   (IFS=','; echo "${expanded[*]}")
1036: }

# Builder Pipeline Agents

Комплексна документація про агентів builder pipeline - як вони працюють, де знаходяться їх конфігурації, і як додати власного агента.

## Огляд системи

Builder pipeline використовує спеціалізовані AI агенти, кожен з яких виконує певну роль в процесі розробки:

```
Task → u-Planner → Preflight → Env-Check → u-Architect → u-Coder → u-Validator → u-Tester → u-Documenter → u-Summarizer → [u-Deployer]
                       ↓           ↓
                 preflight()  env_check()    ↓
                                              u-Auditor (optional)
                                                                                                              ↑
                                                                                                    Phase 8 (opt-in, deploy: true)
```

### Pre-flight фази

1. **Preflight** (`preflight()`): Перевіряє базові інструменти (opencode CLI, Docker, git)
2. **Env-Check** (`env_check()`): Валідує оточення (PHP, Python, Node, PostgreSQL, Redis, extensions)

Детальніше про env-check дивіться в [README.md](README.md#перевірка-оточення-env-check).

### Агенти за ролями

| Агент | Роль | Вендор | Модель |
|-------|------|--------|--------|
| **u-planner** | Аналізує задачу, обирає profile та список агентів | Anthropic | claude-opus-4-6 |
| **u-investigator** | Досліджує баги: root cause, reproduction, impact scope | Anthropic | claude-opus-4-6 |
| **u-architect** | Створює OpenSpec proposal (specs, design, tasks) | Anthropic | claude-opus-4-6 |
| **u-coder** | Пише код на основі specs | Anthropic | claude-sonnet-4-6 |
| **u-auditor** | Quality gate — перевіряє якість agent-related змін | Anthropic | claude-opus-4-6 |
| **u-validator** | Запускає PHPStan, CS-Fixer, виправляє помилки | MiniMax | MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed |
| **u-tester** | Запускає тести, пише нові, виправляє failures | OpenCode Go | kimi-k2.5 |
| **documenter** | Пише білінгвальну документацію (UA+EN) | OpenAI | gpt-5.4 |
| **u-summarizer** | Створює фінальний звіт про виконану роботу | OpenAI | gpt-5.4 |
| **u-deployer** | Phase 8 (opt-in): деплоїть завершені зміни до цільового середовища | Anthropic | claude-sonnet-4-6 |
| **u-ops-agent** | Операційний агент: логи, БД, kubectl, image builds на сервері | Anthropic | claude-sonnet-4-6 |

## Політика неймінгу агентів

У репозиторії використовуються три рівні назв агентів. Це контракт між workflow, prompt-ами та orchestration-логікою.

| Префікс | Де використовується | Призначення | Приклади |
|---------|---------------------|-------------|----------|
| `u-` | Foundry + Ultraworks | Уніфікований агент — один файл для обох workflow | `u-coder`, `u-validator`, `u-tester`, `u-summarizer` |
| `u-` agents cover all roles. No `s-` or unprefixed agents remain (except `builder-planner`). |


### Матриця агентів

| Тип агента | Builder (Foundry) | Ultraworks (Sisyphus) | Примітка |
|------------|---------|------------|----------|
| Unified agent | `u-architect`, `u-coder`, `u-validator`, `u-tester`, `u-summarizer`, `u-auditor`, `u-planner`, `u-investigator`, `u-security-review` | ті самі `u-*` агенти | Один файл, обидва workflow |



### Поточна рекомендація для тестування

| Роль | Основна відповідальність | Час/вартість |
|------|---------------------------|--------------|
| `u-tester` | Швидкі task-scoped тести, impact-based suites, написання або оновлення тестів | Дешевий і частий запуск |
| `u-regression` | Повний regression, cross-app flows, long-running та expensive suites | Дорогий умовний gate |

> `u-regression` наразі є policy-level design target. Поки рантайм не підтримує окремий universal stage, Builder і Ultraworks продовжують працювати через `u-tester`.

### Поточна рекомендація для багів

| Тип бага | Потребує proposal? | Profile |
|----------|-------------------|---------|
| Тривіальний (typo, NPE, config) | Ні | `quick-fix` |
| Середній (зламана логіка, regression) | Ні | `bugfix` |
| Критичний / архітектурний (зламаний контракт) | **Так** | `bugfix+spec` |
| Баг де spec описує неправильну поведінку | **Так** | `bugfix+spec` |

> **Правило:** Proposal потрібен тільки якщо фікс змінює публічний контракт або spec. Якщо фікс — це "код має робити те що spec каже, але не робить" — proposal не потрібен.
>
> `u-investigator` — уніфікований agent. Його логіка описана в `u-investigator.md` і використовується напряму в обох workflow (Foundry та Ultraworks).

### Profiles (обирає planner)

| Profile | Коли використовується | Агенти |
|---------|----------------------|--------|
| **docs-only** | Тільки документація, README | u-documenter → u-summarizer |
| **quality-gate** | PHPStan/CS-Fixer/тести, без нового коду | u-coder → u-validator → u-summarizer |
| **tests-only** | Написати тести для існуючого коду | u-coder → u-tester → u-summarizer |
| **quick-fix** | Дрібні правки, 1-3 файли | u-coder → u-validator → u-summarizer |
| **standard** | Звичайна фіча, один app | u-coder → u-validator → u-tester → u-summarizer |
| **standard+docs** | Фіча + документація | u-coder → u-validator → u-tester → u-documenter → u-summarizer |
| **complex** | Multi-service, міграції, API зміни | u-coder → u-validator → u-tester → u-regression? → u-summarizer |
| **complex+agent** | Зміни що торкаються агентів | u-coder → u-auditor → u-validator → u-tester → u-regression? → u-summarizer |
| **bugfix** | Баг без зміни spec | u-investigator → u-coder → u-validator → u-tester → u-summarizer |
| **bugfix+spec** | Баг що змінює spec поведінку | u-investigator → u-architect → u-coder → u-validator → u-tester → u-summarizer |

> **Примітка 1:** Planner може створити довільний список агентів через `agents` поле в plan.json. Profiles — це лише стартові шаблони.
>
> **Примітка 2:** `u-regression?` означає policy-level conditional gate. Він має запускатися для high-risk змін: shared code, migrations, auth, infra, API contracts, cross-app flows.

## Структура файлів агента

Кожен агент має **два файли конфігурації**:

### 1. Agent definition (`.opencode/agents/<agent>.md`)

**Призначення:** Системний промпт агента + технічні параметри для OpenCode CLI.

**Формат:**
```markdown
---
description: "Short description of agent role"
mode: primary
model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
temperature: 0.1
tools:
  read: true
  write: true
  edit: true
  bash: true
  glob: true
  grep: true
  list: true
---

You are the **Agent Name** agent for the AI Community Platform.

## Your Role

[Detailed role description]

## Workflow

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
...

## Rules

- Rule 1
- Rule 2
...

## Handoff

Update `.opencode/pipeline/handoff.md` — **Agent Name** section with:
- Key information to pass to next agent
```

**Важливі поля:**
- `model:` - ID моделі (див. `opencode models`)
- `temperature:` - 0-2, контролює креативність (0 = детермінований, 2 = креативний)
- `tools:` - які інструменти доступні агенту

**Приклад:** [.opencode/agents/u-coder.md](.opencode/agents/u-coder.md)

### 2. Agent model config (`.opencode/agents.yaml`)

**Призначення:** Конфігурація моделей (primary + fallback) для всіх агентів в одному файлі.

**Формат:**
```yaml
agent_name:
  primary: claude-opus-4-20250514
  fallback: openrouter/google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp,free,cheap
  description: Опис агента
```

**Приклад:** [.opencode/agents.yaml](.opencode/agents.yaml)

## Де знаходяться файли

```
.opencode/agents/
├── u-*.md               # Уніфіковані агенти (Foundry + Ultraworks)




├── builder-planner.md   # Foundry-only builder planner
├── CONTEXT-CONTRACT.md  # Context routing rules
└── agents.yaml          # Конфігурація моделей для всіх агентів

agentic-development/
├── pipeline.sh          # Головний orchestrator
├── pipeline-batch.sh    # Паралельне виконання через git worktrees
├── agents-config.sh     # CLI для управління моделями
└── validate-config.sh   # Валідація конфігурації
```

## Системні промпти агентів

### Анатомія системного промпту

Кожен системний промпт в `.opencode/agents/<agent>.md` містить:

1. **Your Role** - хто ти і що робиш
2. **Workflow** - покрокова інструкція виконання задачі
3. **Tech Stack Reference** - інформація про технології проекту
4. **Rules** - заборони та обмеження
5. **Handoff** - що передати наступному агенту

### Приклад: Coder agent

```markdown
You are the **Coder** agent for the AI Community Platform.

## Your Role

You implement code changes based on approved OpenSpec proposals.
You write clean, minimal, production-ready code.

## Workflow

1. Read `.opencode/pipeline/handoff.md` for context from architect
2. Read the full proposal: `openspec/changes/<id>/proposal.md`
3. Implement tasks from `tasks.md` sequentially
4. Follow existing codebase patterns
5. Keep edits minimal and focused

## Rules

- Follow existing code conventions
- Do NOT add unnecessary abstractions
- Do NOT over-engineer
- Write tests alongside code when specs require them
```

### Ключові принципи системних промптів

✅ **DO:**
- Чітко описуй роль і обов'язки
- Давай покрокові інструкції (numbered lists)
- Вказуй конкретні файли для читання
- Обмежуй scope агента (що він НЕ робить)
- Вказуй формат output (handoff секція)

❌ **DON'T:**
- Не роби промпт занадто довгим (> 100 рядків)
- Не дублюй інформацію між агентами
- Не давай абстрактних інструкцій ("зроби якісно")
- Не описуй інструменти (agent знає їх сам)

## Рекомендована матриця запуску

| Сценарій | Швидкий тестовий gate | Повний regression gate |
|----------|------------------------|-------------------------|
| `quick-fix` | `u-tester` за потреби | ні |
| `standard` | так | лише якщо high-risk |
| `standard+docs` | так | лише якщо high-risk |
| `complex` | так | так, умовно через `u-regression` |
| `complex+agent` | так | так, майже завжди |

### High-risk тригери для regression gate

- shared libraries або shared contracts
- зміни в auth / sessions / access control
- DB migrations або data migrations
- infra / compose / networking / queue topology
- cross-app API changes
- великі admin UI або E2E-critical зміни

## Конфігурація Fallback моделей

### Як працює fallback chain

Коли primary модель недоступна (rate limit, API error), pipeline автоматично пробує fallback моделі **в порядку черги**:

```yaml
coder:
  primary: claude-opus-4-20250514
  fallback: openrouter/google/gemini-2.0-flash-thinking-exp,free,cheap
```

**Fallback chain:**
1. `claude-opus-4-20250514` (primary)
2. `openrouter/google/gemini-2.0-flash-thinking-exp` (fallback #1)
3. `free` → розгортається в список безкоштовних моделей
4. `cheap` → розгортається в список дешевих моделей

### Virtual models

**`free`** - безкоштовні моделі через OpenRouter:
```yaml
virtual_models:
  free:
    - openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-chat:free
    - openrouter/google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free
    - openrouter/meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free
    - openrouter/qwen/qwen3-235b-a22b:free
    - openrouter/mistralai/mistral-small-3.2-24b-instruct:free
```

**`cheap`** - дешеві моделі (< $1 per 1M tokens):
```yaml
virtual_models:
  cheap:
    - openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v3.2        # $0.30/1M
    - openrouter/google/gemini-2.0-flash-thinking-exp  # $0.10/1M
    - openrouter/qwen/qwen3-coder              # $0.15/1M
    - openrouter/google/gemini-2.5-flash-lite  # $0.08/1M
```

### Зміна fallback моделі через CLI

```bash
# Показати поточну конфігурацію
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh show

# Змінити primary модель для агента
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh set coder claude-opus-4-20250514

# Змінити fallback chain
yq eval -i '.coder.fallback = "gemini-2.5-pro,free,cheap"' .opencode/agents.yaml

# Перевірити конфігурацію
./agentic-development/validate-config.sh
```

### Стратегії fallback

`.opencode/agents.yaml` містить готові стратегії:

**1. Optimal (за замовчуванням)** - Claude для якості, fallback на free:
```yaml
strategies:
  optimal:
    coder: claude-opus-4-20250514,gemini-2.0-flash-thinking,free
    validator: claude-sonnet-4-20250514,free,cheap
```

**2. Free-only** - тільки безкоштовні моделі:
```yaml
strategies:
  free_only:
    coder: free
    validator: free
```

**3. Subscription-only** - тільки Claude (якщо є підписка):
```yaml
strategies:
  subscription_only:
    coder: claude-opus-4-20250514
    validator: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
```

**Змінити стратегію:**
```bash
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh strategy free_only
```

## Як додати нового агента

### Крок 1: Визначити роль агента

Задай собі питання:
- Що робить цей агент?
- Яку проблему він вирішує?
- Де він стоїть в pipeline? (після якого агента, перед яким)
- Які інструменти йому потрібні? (read, write, edit, bash, grep, glob)
- Який output він передає наступному агенту?

**Приклад:** Додаємо `reviewer` агента - code review перед тестуванням.

### Крок 2: Створити agent definition

Створи файл `.opencode/agents/reviewer.md`:

```markdown
---
description: "Reviewer agent: performs code review and suggests improvements"
mode: primary
model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
temperature: 0.2
tools:
  read: true
  grep: true
  glob: true
  list: true
---

You are the **Reviewer** agent for the AI Community Platform.

## Your Role

You perform code review on changes made by the coder agent. You identify:
- Code quality issues (complexity, duplication)
- Potential bugs and edge cases
- Security vulnerabilities
- Performance concerns

You do NOT write code - only review and suggest improvements.

## Workflow

1. Read `.opencode/pipeline/handoff.md` to know which files were changed
2. Read each modified file and analyze:
   - Correctness (does it match the spec?)
   - Readability (is it easy to understand?)
   - Maintainability (is it easy to change?)
   - Security (are there vulnerabilities?)
3. Check for common issues:
   - SQL injection, XSS vulnerabilities
   - Unhandled errors and exceptions
   - Race conditions in async code
   - Missing validation of user input
4. Suggest specific improvements with file:line references

## Output Format

Write review comments in `.opencode/pipeline/review.md`:

```markdown
## Critical Issues (must fix)

- [apps/brama-core/src/Foo.php:42] SQL injection vulnerability - use prepared statements
- [apps/brama-core/src/Bar.php:15] Unhandled exception in async operation

## Suggestions (nice to have)

- [apps/brama-core/src/Baz.php:30] Extract complex logic into separate method
```

## Rules

- Focus on correctness and security first, style second
- Reference specific lines: `file.php:line`
- Suggest fixes, don't just complain
- If no issues found, say so explicitly

## Handoff

Update `.opencode/pipeline/handoff.md` — **Reviewer** section with:
- Critical issues count
- Suggestions count
- Overall code quality assessment (good/acceptable/needs work)
```

### Крок 3: Додати конфігурацію моделі

Додай агента в `.opencode/agents.yaml`:

```yaml
reviewer:
  primary: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  fallback: openrouter/google/gemini-2.5-pro,free,cheap
  description: Code review та пошук проблем
```

І в кожну стратегію:

```yaml
strategies:
  optimal:
    reviewer: claude-sonnet-4-20250514,gemini-2.5-pro,free
  free_only:
    reviewer: free
  subscription_only:
    reviewer: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
```

### Крок 4: Інтегрувати в pipeline

Відредагуй `agentic-development/pipeline.sh`:

**4.1. Додай timeout для агента:**
```bash
PIPELINE_TIMEOUT_REVIEWER="${PIPELINE_TIMEOUT_REVIEWER:-600}"  # 10 min
```

**4.2. Додай fallback конфігурацію:**
```bash
FALLBACK_REVIEWER="${PIPELINE_FALLBACK_REVIEWER:-claude-sonnet-4-20250514,gemini-2.5-pro,free,cheap}"
```

**4.3. Додай агента в порядок виконання:**
```bash
# Agent order
AGENTS=(architect coder reviewer validator tester summarizer)
```

**4.4. Додай в profiles (якщо потрібно):**

Відредагуй `.opencode/pipeline/profiles.json`:

```json
{
  "standard": {
    "agents": ["architect", "coder", "reviewer", "validator", "tester", "summarizer"],
    "description": "Standard feature with code review"
  },
  "complex": {
    "agents": ["architect", "coder", "reviewer", "auditor", "validator", "tester", "summarizer"],
    "description": "Complex change with review and audit"
  }
}
```

### Крок 5: Тестування

```bash
# 1. Валідація конфігурації
./agentic-development/validate-config.sh

# 2. Тестова задача
echo "# Test reviewer

Simple test to verify reviewer agent works.

Create file test.txt with content 'hello'." > /tmp/test-reviewer.md

# 3. Запуск pipeline
./agentic-development/foundry.sh run --task-file /tmp/test-reviewer.md

# 4. Перевірка результату
cat .opencode/pipeline/handoff.md  # Чи є секція Reviewer?
cat .opencode/pipeline/review.md   # Чи створив reviewer свій output?
```

### Крок 6: Документація

Оновити документи:
- `agentic-development/AGENTS.md` (цей файл) - додати в таблицю агентів
- `docs/setup/QUICKSTART.md` - згадати нового агента якщо він критичний
- `agentic-development/skill/SKILL.md` - оновити список агентів для builder-agent skill

## Best Practices для створення агентів

### 1. Принцип Single Responsibility

✅ **DO:** Один агент = одна чітка роль
```
coder: пише код
validator: перевіряє код
tester: тестує код
```

❌ **DON'T:** Агент робить все
```
mega-agent: пише код, тестує, деплоїть, пише docs
```

### 2. Четкий Input/Output через Handoff

Кожен агент **читає** handoff попереднього агента і **пише** свою секцію:

```markdown
## Coder

Files changed:
- apps/brama-core/src/Foo.php (created)
- apps/brama-core/src/Bar.php (modified)

Migrations:
- apps/brama-core/migrations/Version20260318000001.php

## Validator

PHPStan: ✅ PASS (0 errors)
CS-Check: ✅ PASS (0 violations)

Files fixed: none
```

### 3. Fallback chain: від якісних до дешевих

```yaml
# ✅ GOOD: якість → швидкість → ціна
primary: claude-opus-4
fallback: claude-sonnet-4,gemini-2.5-pro,free,cheap

# ❌ BAD: одразу дешеві
primary: free
fallback: cheap
```

**Reasoning:** Primary має бути найякіснішим, fallback - поступово дешевшим.

### 4. Temperature за типом задачі

```yaml
# Детермінований output (code, validation)
coder:
  temperature: 0.1

validator:
  temperature: 0

# Креативний output (architecture, design)
architect:
  temperature: 0.3

# Аналітичний output (review, summary)
reviewer:
  temperature: 0.2
```

### 5. Мінімальний набір tools

Давай агенту **тільки потрібні** інструменти:

```yaml
# ✅ Validator: тільки читання + bash для запуску phpstan
validator:
  tools:
    read: true
    bash: true
    edit: true  # для фіксу помилок

# ❌ Validator з зайвими tools
validator:
  tools:
    read: true
    write: true   # не потрібен
    bash: true
    websearch: true  # не потрібен
```

## Troubleshooting

### Проблема: "Model not found"

**Причина:** model ID в `.opencode/agents/<agent>.md` не існує.

**Рішення:**
```bash
# 1. Перевірити доступні моделі
opencode models | grep claude

# 2. Використати точний ID з списку
# ✅ anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514
# ❌ anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6

# 3. Оновити agent file
vim .opencode/agents/coder.md
# model: claude-opus-4-20250514
```

### Проблема: Agent не отримує context з попереднього агента

**Причина:** Попередній агент не оновив handoff.

**Рішення:** Додай в системний промпт попереднього агента:

```markdown
## Handoff

Update `.opencode/pipeline/handoff.md` — **Your Agent** section with:
- Key information for next agent
- Status of your work
- Any blockers or issues
```

### Проблема: Fallback не спрацьовує

**Причина:** Fallback models не в `.opencode/agents.yaml`.

**Рішення:**
```bash
# Перевірити конфігурацію
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh show

# Додати fallback
yq eval -i '.your_agent.fallback = "gemini-2.5-pro,free,cheap"' .opencode/agents.yaml

# Валідувати
./agentic-development/validate-config.sh
```

### Проблема: Agent занадто повільний

**Причина:** Використовується велика модель (claude-opus) для простої задачі.

**Рішення:** Використай меншу модель:

```yaml
# Для простих задач (validation, testing)
validator:
  primary: claude-sonnet-4-20250514  # швидша, дешевша

# Для складних задач (architecture, coding)
architect:
  primary: claude-opus-4-20250514  # якісніша, повільніша
```

## Корисні команди

```bash
# Показати конфігурацію всіх агентів
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh show

# Валідувати конфігурацію
./agentic-development/validate-config.sh

# Перелік доступних моделей
opencode models

# Змінити модель для агента
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh set coder claude-opus-4-20250514

# Експортувати конфігурацію для pipeline
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh export

# Змінити стратегію
./agentic-development/agents-config.sh strategy free_only

# Тест pipeline з одним агентом
./agentic-development/foundry.sh run --only coder "Test task"
```

## Додаткові ресурси

- **Provider setup:** [docs/setup/ai-providers.md](../docs/setup/ai-providers.md)
- **Gemini strategy:** [docs/setup/gemini-strategy.md](../docs/setup/gemini-strategy.md)
- **Quickstart:** [docs/setup/QUICKSTART.md](../docs/setup/QUICKSTART.md)
- **OpenSpec conventions:** [openspec/AGENTS.md](../openspec/AGENTS.md)
- **Builder skill:** [.claude/skills/builder-agent/skill.md](../.claude/skills/builder-agent/skill.md)

---

**Підтримка:** Якщо є питання або знайшли баг - створи issue або питай в чаті платформи.

</system-reminder>

metadata.preview:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#
# Multi-agent pipeline orchestrator for OpenCode.
#
# Runs pipeline agents in sequence:
#   1. Architect (Opus)      — creates OpenSpec proposal
#   2. Coder (Sonnet)        — implements the code
#   3. Auditor (optional)    — audits agent/platform compliance
#   4. Validator (Codex)     — runs PHPStan + CS, fixes issues
#   5. Tester (Codex)        — runs tests, fixes failures
#   6. Documenter (optional) — writes documentation
#   7. Summarizer (GPT-5.4)  — writes final task summary to tasks/<slug>--foundry/summary.md
#
# Usage:
#   ./scripts/pipeline.sh "Add streaming support to A2A gateway"
#   ./scripts/pipeline.sh --skip-architect "implement change add-a2a-streaming"
#   ./scripts/pipeline.sh --from coder "Continue implementing add-a2a-streaming"

16: pipeline_slugify() {
17:   local text="${1:-unknown}"
18:   python3 - "$text" <<'PYEOF'
19: import re
20: import sys
21: 
22: text = sys.argv[1]
23: title = ""
24: for line in text.splitlines():
25:     stripped = line.strip()
26:     if stripped.startswith("# "):
27:         title = stripped[2:].strip()
28:         break
29:     if stripped and not stripped.startswith("<!--"):
30:         title = stripped
31:         break
32: 
33: if not title:
34:     title = "unknown"
35: 
36: slug = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", title.lower()).strip("-")
37: print((slug or "unknown")[:60])
38: PYEOF
39: }

214: foundry_repair_state_file() {
215:   local task_dir="$1"
216:   local task_file="${2:-$task_dir/task.md}"
217:   python3 - "$task_dir" "$task_file" <<'PYEOF'
218: import json
219: import sys
220: from datetime import datetime, timezone
221: from pathlib import Path
222: 
223: task_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
224: task_file = Path(sys.argv[2])
225: state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
226: meta_path = task_dir / "meta.json"
227: now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
228: 
229: existing = {}
230: if state_path.exists():
231:     try:
232:         loaded = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
233:         if isinstance(loaded, dict):
234:             existing = loaded
235:     except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError, TypeError, ValueError):
236:         existing = {}
237: 
238: def normalize_str(value):
239:     return value if isinstance(value, str) and value.strip() else None
240: 
241: def normalize_attempt(value):
242:     try:
243:         num = int(value)
244:     except (TypeError, ValueError):
245:         return 1
246:     return num if num >= 1 else 1
247: 
248: payload = {
249:     "task_id": normalize_str(existing.get("task_id")) or task_dir.name,
250:     "workflow": "foundry",
251:     "started_at": normalize_str(existing.get("started_at")) or now,
252:     "attempt": normalize_attempt(existing.get("attempt")),
253:     "status": normalize_str(existing.get("status")) or "pending",
254:     "current_step": normalize_str(existing.get("current_step")),
255:     "resume_from": normalize_str(existing.get("resume_from")),
256:     "updated_at": now,
257:     "task_file": normalize_str(existing.get("task_file")) or str(task_file),
258:     "branch": normalize_str(existing.get("branch")),
259: }
260: 
261: if meta_path.exists():
262:     try:
263:         meta = json.loads(meta_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
264:         if isinstance(meta, dict) and normalize_str(meta.get("branch_name")):
265:             payload["branch"] = normalize_str(meta.get("branch_name"))
266:     except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError, TypeError, ValueError):
267:         pass
268: 
269: # Preserve agents array if present
270: agents = existing.get("agents")
271: if isinstance(agents, list) and agents:
272:     payload["agents"] = agents
273: 
274: with open(state_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
275:     json.dump(payload, fh, ensure_ascii=True, indent=2)
276:     fh.write("\n")
277: PYEOF
278: }

468: # ── Atomic task claiming for parallel workers ───────────────────────
469: # Returns 0 if task was claimed, 1 if already taken.
470: # Uses fcntl file locking via Python for atomicity.
471: foundry_claim_task() {
472:   local task_dir="$1"
473:   local worker_id="${2:-main}"
474:   python3 - "$task_dir" "$worker_id" <<'PYEOF'
475: import fcntl
476: import json
477: import sys
478: from datetime import datetime, timezone
479: from pathlib import Path
480: 
481: task_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
482: worker_id = sys.argv[2]
483: state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
484: lock_path = task_dir / ".claim.lock"
485: 
486: # Create lock file
487: lock_path.touch(exist_ok=True)
488: lock_fd = open(lock_path, "r+")
489: 
490: try:
491:     fcntl.flock(lock_fd.fileno(), fcntl.LOCK_EX | fcntl.LOCK_NB)
492: except (OSError, IOError):
493:     # Another process holds the lock
494:     lock_fd.close()
495:     raise SystemExit(1)
496: 
497: try:
498:     data = {}
499:     if state_path.exists():
500:         try:
501:             data = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
502:             if not isinstance(data, dict):
503:                 data = {}
504:         except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
505:             data = {}
506: 
507:     status = data.get("status", "pending")
508:     if status != "pending":
509:         # Already claimed or not available
510:         raise SystemExit(1)
511: 
512:     now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
513:     data["status"] = "in_progress"
514:     data["worker_id"] = worker_id
515:     data["claimed_at"] = now
516:     data["updated_at"] = now
517: 
518:     with open(state_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
519:         json.dump(data, fh, ensure_ascii=True, indent=2)
520:         fh.write("\n")
521: 
522:     # Success
523:     raise SystemExit(0)
524: finally:
525:     fcntl.flock(lock_fd.fileno(), fcntl.LOCK_UN)
526:     lock_fd.close()
527: PYEOF
528: }

543:   current_status=$(foundry_state_field "$task_dir" status 2>/dev/null || echo "")
544:   if [[ "$current_status" == "in_progress" || "$current_status" == "pending" ]]; then
545:     foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "stopped" "" ""
546:   fi

549: foundry_resume_stopped_task() {
550:   local task_dir="$1"
551:   local current_status
552:   current_status=$(foundry_state_field "$task_dir" status 2>/dev/null || echo "")
553:   if [[ "$current_status" != "stopped" ]]; then
554:     echo "Warning: Task is not in stopped state (current: $current_status)" >&2
555:     return 1
556:   fi
557: 
558:   # Use foundry-preflight.sh resume if available, otherwise fallback to basic resume
559:   if [[ -f "$REPO_ROOT/agentic-development/lib/foundry-preflight.sh" ]]; then
560:     # Source preflight and use its resume function (clears stop fields properly)
561:     # shellcheck source=/dev/null
562:     source "$REPO_ROOT/agentic-development/lib/foundry-preflight.sh"
563:     # foundry-preflight.sh has its own foundry_resume_stopped_task that clears stop fields
564:     return 0
565:   fi
566: 
567:   # Fallback: basic resume
568:   foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "pending" "" ""
569:   pipeline_task_append_event "$task_dir" "task_resumed" "Task resumed from stopped state" ""
570: }

572: # Find and claim the next pending task (priority-sorted). Prints task_dir on success.
573: foundry_claim_next_task() {
574:   local worker_id="${1:-main}"
575:   python3 - "$PIPELINE_TASKS_ROOT" "$worker_id" <<'PYEOF'
576: import fcntl
577: import json
578: import re
579: import sys
580: from datetime import datetime, timezone
581: from pathlib import Path
582: 
583: root = Path(sys.argv[1])
584: worker_id = sys.argv[2]
585: 
586: # Collect pending tasks with priority
587: candidates = []
588: for task_dir in sorted(root.glob("*--foundry*")):
589:     if not task_dir.is_dir():
590:         continue
591:     state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
592:     status = "pending"
593:     if state_path.exists():
594:         try:
595:             status = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("status", "pending")
596:         except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
597:             status = "pending"
598:     if status != "pending":
599:         continue
600: 
601:     # Read priority from task.md
602:     priority = 1
603:     task_md = task_dir / "task.md"
604:     if task_md.exists():
605:         try:
606:             first_line = task_md.read_text(encoding="utf-8").split("\n", 1)[0]
607:             m = re.search(r"<!--\s*priority:\s*(\d+)\s*-->", first_line)
608:             if m:
609:                 priority = int(m.group(1))
610:         except (OSError, ValueError):
611:             pass
612: 
613:     candidates.append((priority, task_dir))
614: 
615: # Sort by priority descending
616: candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
617: 
618: # Try to claim each one atomically
619: now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
620: 
621: for _, task_dir in candidates:
622:     state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
623:     lock_path = task_dir / ".claim.lock"
624:     lock_path.touch(exist_ok=True)
625: 
626:     try:
627:         lock_fd = open(lock_path, "r+")
628:         fcntl.flock(lock_fd.fileno(), fcntl.LOCK_EX | fcntl.LOCK_NB)
629:     except (OSError, IOError):
630:         continue  # Another worker is claiming this one
631: 
632:     try:
633:         data = {}
634:         if state_path.exists():
635:             try:
636:                 data = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
637:                 if not isinstance(data, dict):
638:                     data = {}
639:             except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
640:                 data = {}
641: 
642:         if data.get("status", "pending") != "pending":
643:             continue  # Already claimed between check and lock
644: 
645:         # Ensure all required fields exist — covers tasks created manually
646:         # (task.md placed in tasks/ without going through foundry_create_task_dir)
647:         data.setdefault("task_id", task_dir.name)
648:         data.setdefault("workflow", "foundry")
649:         data.setdefault("attempt", 1)
650:         data.setdefault("current_step", None)
651:         data.setdefault("resume_from", None)
652:         data.setdefault("branch", None)
653:         data.setdefault("task_file", str(task_dir / "task.md"))
654:         data.setdefault("started_at", now)
655: 
656:         data["status"] = "in_progress"
657:         data["worker_id"] = worker_id
658:         data["claimed_at"] = now
659:         data["updated_at"] = now
660: 
661:         with open(state_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
662:             json.dump(data, fh, ensure_ascii=True, indent=2)
663:             fh.write("\n")
664: 
665:         print(task_dir)
666:         raise SystemExit(0)
667:     finally:
668:         fcntl.flock(lock_fd.fileno(), fcntl.LOCK_UN)
669:         lock_fd.close()
670: 
671: # No task available
672: raise SystemExit(1)
673: PYEOF
674: }
675: 
676: # ── Git worktree management for parallel workers ────────────────────
677: WORKTREE_BASE="${REPO_ROOT}/.pipeline-worktrees"
678: 
679: foundry_worktree_path() {
680:   local worker_id="$1"
681:   echo "${WORKTREE_BASE}/${worker_id}"
682: }
683: 
684: foundry_create_worktree() {
685:   local worker_id="$1"
686:   local wt_path
687:   wt_path=$(foundry_worktree_path "$worker_id")
688: 
689:   if [[ -d "$wt_path" ]]; then
690:     # Worktree exists — verify it's valid, reuse it
691:     if git -C "$REPO_ROOT" worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -qF "$wt_path"; then
692:       # Pull latest from main branch
693:       local main_branch
694:       main_branch=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's@refs/remotes/origin/@@' || echo "main")
695:       git -C "$wt_path" checkout "$main_branch" 2>/dev/null || true
696:       git -C "$wt_path" reset --hard "origin/$main_branch" 2>/dev/null || true
697:       echo "$wt_path"
698:       return 0
699:     fi
700:     # Stale directory — remove and recreate
701:     rm -rf "$wt_path"
702:     git -C "$REPO_ROOT" worktree prune 2>/dev/null || true
703:   fi
704: 
705:   mkdir -p "$WORKTREE_BASE"
706: 
707:   # Determine main branch
708:   local main_branch
709:   main_branch=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's@refs/remotes/origin/@@' || echo "main")
710: 
711:   # Create worktree from origin/main (not HEAD) to ensure all workers start from main
712:   local wt_branch="pipeline-worker-${worker_id}"
713:   git -C "$REPO_ROOT" branch -D "$wt_branch" 2>/dev/null || true
714:   git -C "$REPO_ROOT" worktree add -b "$wt_branch" "$wt_path" "origin/$main_branch" 2>/dev/null || {
715:     # Fallback: try local main branch
716:     git -C "$REPO_ROOT" worktree add -b "$wt_branch" "$wt_path" "$main_branch" 2>/dev/null || {
717:       # Last resort: detached HEAD from origin/main
718:       git -C "$REPO_ROOT" worktree add --detach "$wt_path" "origin/$main_branch" 2>/dev/null || return 1
719:     }
720:   }
721: 
722:   echo "$wt_path"
723: }
724: 
725: foundry_cleanup_worktree() {
726:   local worker_id="$1"
727:   local wt_path
728:   wt_path=$(foundry_worktree_path "$worker_id")
729:   [[ -d "$wt_path" ]] || return 0
730:   git -C "$REPO_ROOT" worktree remove --force "$wt_path" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$wt_path"
731:   git -C "$REPO_ROOT" worktree prune 2>/dev/null || true
732: }

734: foundry_list_active_workers() {
735:   # List worker IDs that are currently running (have live foundry-run.sh processes)
736:   local pids
737:   pids=$(pgrep -f 'foundry-run\.sh' 2>/dev/null || true)
738:   [[ -z "$pids" ]] && return 0
739:   ps -o args= -p $pids 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r args; do
740:     if [[ "$args" =~ \.pipeline-worktrees/(worker-[0-9]+) ]]; then
741:       echo "${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
742:     elif [[ "$args" =~ PIPELINE_WORKER_ID=([^ ]+) ]]; then
743:       echo "${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
744:     fi
745:   done | sort -u
746: }

748: foundry_count_active_workers() {

750:   while IFS= read -r _; do
751:     count=$((count + 1))
752:   done < <(foundry_list_active_workers)
753:   echo "$count"
754: }

756: foundry_state_upsert_agent() {
757:   local task_dir="$1"
758:   local agent="$2"
759:   local status="$3"
760:   local model="${4:-}"
761:   local duration_seconds="${5:-}"
762:   local input_tokens="${6:-}"
763:   local output_tokens="${7:-}"
764:   local cost="${8:-}"
765:   local call_count="${9:-1}"
766:   foundry_repair_state_file "$task_dir"
767:   python3 - "$task_dir" "$agent" "$status" "$model" "$duration_seconds" "$input_tokens" "$output_tokens" "$cost" "$call_count" <<'PYEOF'
768: import json
769: import sys
770: from datetime import datetime, timezone
771: from pathlib import Path
772: 
773: task_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
774: agent, status, model = sys.argv[2], sys.argv[3], sys.argv[4]
775: duration_seconds = sys.argv[5]
776: input_tokens = sys.argv[6]
777: output_tokens = sys.argv[7]
778: cost = sys.argv[8]
779: call_count = sys.argv[9]
780: 
781: state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
782: data = {}
783: if state_path.exists():
784:     try:
785:         data = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
786:         if not isinstance(data, dict):
787:             data = {}
788:     except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
789:         data = {}
790: 
791: agents = data.get("agents", [])
792: if not isinstance(agents, list):
793:     agents = []
794: 
795: # Find existing agent entry or create new
796: entry = None
797: for a in agents:
798:     if a.get("agent") == agent:
799:         entry = a
800:         break
801: if entry is None:
802:     entry = {"agent": agent}
803:     agents.append(entry)
804: 
805: entry["status"] = status
806: 
807: def set_int(key, val):
808:     if val:
809:         try:
810:             entry[key] = int(float(val))
811:             return
812:         except (ValueError, TypeError):
813:             pass
814:     entry.setdefault(key, "n/d")
815: 
816: def set_float(key, val):
817:     if val:
818:         try:
819:             entry[key] = round(float(val), 4)
820:             return
821:         except (ValueError, TypeError):
822:             pass
823:     entry.setdefault(key, "n/d")
824: 
825: entry["model"] = model if model else entry.get("model", "n/d")
826: set_int("duration_seconds", duration_seconds)
827: set_int("input_tokens", input_tokens)
828: set_int("output_tokens", output_tokens)
829: set_float("cost", cost)
830: set_int("call_count", call_count)
831: 
832: entry["updated_at"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
833: 
834: data["agents"] = agents
835: data["updated_at"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
836: 
837: with open(state_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
838:     json.dump(data, fh, ensure_ascii=True, indent=2)
839:     fh.write("\n")
840: PYEOF
841: }
842: 
843: # Write all planned agents to state.json as "pending" + set profile
844: # Called ONCE after planner determines the agent list, before execution starts.
845: foundry_state_set_planned_agents() {
846:   local task_dir="$1"
847:   local profile="$2"
848:   shift 2
849:   local agents=("$@")
850:   foundry_repair_state_file "$task_dir"
851:   python3 - "$task_dir" "$profile" "${agents[@]}" <<'PYEOF'
852: import json
853: import sys
854: from datetime import datetime, timezone
855: from pathlib import Path
856: 
857: task_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
858: profile = sys.argv[2]
859: planned_agents = sys.argv[3:]
860: 
861: state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
862: data = {}
863: if state_path.exists():
864:     try:
865:         data = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
866:         if not isinstance(data, dict):
867:             data = {}
868:     except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
869:         data = {}
870: 
871: # Preserve existing agent entries (planner may already be "done")
872: existing = {a["agent"]: a for a in data.get("agents", []) if isinstance(a, dict)}
873: 
874: agents = []
875: for name in planned_agents:
876:     if name in existing:
877:         agents.append(existing[name])
878:     else:
879:         agents.append({
880:             "agent": name,
881:             "status": "pending",
882:             "model": "",
883:             "duration_seconds": 0,
884:             "input_tokens": 0,
885:             "output_tokens": 0,
886:             "cost": 0,
887:             "call_count": 0,
888:             "updated_at": ""
889:         })
890: 
891: data["agents"] = agents
892: data["profile"] = profile
893: data["updated_at"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
894: 
895: with open(state_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
896:     json.dump(data, fh, ensure_ascii=True, indent=2)
897:     fh.write("\n")
898: PYEOF
899: }

901: foundry_create_task_dir() {
902:   local task_text="$1"
903:   local slug="${2:-}"
904:   [[ -n "$slug" ]] || slug=$(pipeline_slugify "$task_text")
905:   local task_dir
906:   task_dir=$(pipeline_task_dir_create "$slug" "foundry" "$task_text")
907:   mkdir -p "$(foundry_artifacts_dir "$task_dir")" "$(foundry_telemetry_dir "$task_dir")"
908:   [[ -f "$(foundry_meta_file "$task_dir")" ]] || cat > "$(foundry_meta_file "$task_dir")" <<EOF
909: {
910:   "workflow": "foundry",
911:   "task_slug": "${slug}",
912:   "created_at": "$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
913: }
914: EOF
915:   [[ -f "$(foundry_state_path "$task_dir")" ]] || foundry_write_state "$task_dir" "pending" "" ""
916:   echo "$task_dir"
917: }
918: 
919: # Ensure state.json exists for a task directory.
920: # If task.md exists but state.json does not, creates state.json with status=pending.
921: # This covers tasks created manually (by copying task.md into tasks/) without going
922: # through foundry_create_task_dir(), which is the only other place state.json is written.
923: foundry_ensure_state_json() {
924:   local task_dir="$1"
925:   local state_path="$task_dir/state.json"
926:   [[ -f "$state_path" ]] && return 0
927:   [[ -f "$task_dir/task.md" ]] || return 0
928:   foundry_write_state "$task_dir" "pending" "" "" "$task_dir/task.md"
929: }
930: 
931: foundry_list_task_dirs() {
932:   ensure_pipeline_tasks_root
933:   local dir
934:   while IFS= read -r dir; do
935:     foundry_ensure_state_json "$dir"
936:     echo "$dir"
937:   done < <(find "$PIPELINE_TASKS_ROOT" -maxdepth 1 -type d -name '*--foundry*' | sort)
938: }
939: 
940: foundry_find_tasks_by_status() {
941:   local wanted="${1:-pending}"
942:   python3 - "$PIPELINE_TASKS_ROOT" "$wanted" <<'PYEOF'
943: import json
944: import sys
945: from datetime import datetime, timezone
946: from pathlib import Path
947: 
948: root = Path(sys.argv[1])
949: wanted = set(sys.argv[2].split(","))
950: now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
951: 
952: for task_dir in sorted(root.glob("*--foundry*")):
953:     if not task_dir.is_dir():
954:         continue
955:     state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
956:     # Auto-create state.json for manually-placed task.md files
957:     if not state_path.exists() and (task_dir / "task.md").exists():
958:         payload = {
959:             "task_id": task_dir.name,
960:             "workflow": "foundry",
961:             "started_at": now,
962:             "attempt": 1,
963:             "status": "pending",
964:             "current_step": None,
965:             "resume_from": None,
966:             "updated_at": now,
967:             "task_file": str(task_dir / "task.md"),
968:             "branch": None,
969:         }
970:         try:
971:             state_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=True) + "\n")
972:         except OSError:
973:             pass
974:     status = "pending"
975:     if state_path.exists():
976:         try:
977:             status = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("status", "pending")
978:         except json.JSONDecodeError:
979:             status = "pending"
980:     if status in wanted:
981:         print(task_dir)
982: PYEOF
983: }

985: foundry_task_counts() {
986:   python3 - "$PIPELINE_TASKS_ROOT" <<'PYEOF'
987: import json
988: import sys
989: from collections import Counter
990: from datetime import datetime, timezone
991: from pathlib import Path
992: 
993: root = Path(sys.argv[1])
994: counts = Counter()
995: now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z")
996: 
997: for task_dir in root.glob("*--foundry*"):
998:     if not task_dir.is_dir():
999:         continue
1000:     state_path = task_dir / "state.json"
1001:     # Auto-create state.json for manually-placed task.md files
1002:     if not state_path.exists() and (task_dir / "task.md").exists():
1003:         payload = {
1004:             "task_id": task_dir.name,
1005:             "workflow": "foundry",
1006:             "started_at": now,
1007:             "attempt": 1,
1008:             "status": "pending",
1009:             "current_step": None,
1010:             "resume_from": None,
1011:             "updated_at": now,
1012:             "task_file": str(task_dir / "task.md"),
1013:             "branch": None,
1014:         }
1015:         try:
1016:             state_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=True) + "\n")
1017:         except OSError:
1018:             pass
1019:     status = "pending"
1020:     if state_path.exists():
1021:         try:
1022:             status = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("status", "pending")
1023:         except json.JSONDecodeError:
1024:             status = "pending"
1025:     counts[status] += 1
1026: for key in ["pending", "in_progress", "completed", "failed", "suspended", "cancelled", "stopped"]:
1027:     print(f"{key}={counts.get(key, 0)}")
1028: PYEOF
1029: }

1031: foundry_migrate_legacy_state() {
1032:   local queue_root="$1"
1033:   local status="$2"
1034:   local src_dir="$queue_root/$status"
1035:   [[ -d "$src_dir" ]] || return 0
1036:   local file task_dir slug cleaned
1037:   for file in "$src_dir"/*.md; do
1038:     [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
1039:     slug=$(basename "$file" .md)
1040:     task_dir=$(foundry_task_dir_for_slug "$slug" || true)
1041:     if [[ -z "$task_dir" ]]; then
1042:       cleaned=$(sed '/^<!-- batch:.*-->$/d;/^<!-- suspended:.*-->$/d' "$file")
1043:       task_dir=$(foundry_create_task_dir "$cleaned" "$slug")
1044:     fi
1045:     if [[ ! -f "$task_dir/task.md" || ! -s "$task_dir/task.md" ]]; then
1046:       sed '/^<!-- batch:.*-->$/d;/^<!-- suspended:.*-->$/d' "$file" > "$task_dir/task.md"
1047:     fi
1048:     case "$status" in
1049:       todo) foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "pending" "" "" ;;
1050:       in-progress) foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "in_progress" "" "" ;;
1051:       done|archive) foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "completed" "" "" ;;
1052:       failed) foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "failed" "" "" ;;
1053:       suspended) foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "suspended" "" "" ;;
1054:       stopped) foundry_set_state_status "$task_dir" "stopped" "" "" ;;
1055:     esac
1056:   done
1057: }

1059: foundry_migrate_legacy_artifacts() {
1060:   local src_root="$1"
1061:   local artifact_root="$src_root/artifacts"
1062:   local summary_root="$src_root/summary"
1063:   [[ -d "$artifact_root" || -d "$summary_root" ]] || return 0
1064: 
1065:   local dir slug task_dir
1066:   if [[ -d "$artifact_root" ]]; then
1067:     for dir in "$artifact_root"/*; do
1068:       [[ -d "$dir" ]] || continue
1069:       slug=$(basename "$dir")
1070:       task_dir=$(foundry_task_dir_for_slug "$slug" || true)
1071:       [[ -n "$task_dir" ]] || task_dir=$(foundry_create_task_dir "# ${slug}" "$slug")
1072:       mkdir -p "$(foundry_artifacts_dir "$task_dir")"
1073:       if [[ ! -e "$(foundry_artifacts_dir "$task_dir")/$(basename "$dir")" ]]; then
1074:         cp -R "$dir" "$(foundry_artifacts_dir "$task_dir")/" 2>/dev/null || true
1075:       fi
1076:     done
1077:   fi
1078: 
1079:   local summary_file summary_name
1080:   if [[ -d "$summary_root" ]]; then
1081:     for summary_file in "$summary_root"/*.md; do
1082:       [[ -f "$summary_file" ]] || continue
1083:       summary_name=$(basename "$summary_file")
1084:       slug=$(printf '%s' "$summary_name" | sed -E 's/^[a-z]-[0-9_]+-//; s/\.md$//')
1085:       task_dir=$(foundry_task_dir_for_slug "$slug" || true)
1086:       [[ -n "$task_dir" ]] || continue
1087:       if [[ ! -s "$(foundry_summary_file "$task_dir")" ]]; then
1088:         cp "$summary_file" "$(foundry_summary_file "$task_dir")" 2>/dev/null || true
1089:       fi
1090:     done
1091:   fi
1092: }

1094: maybe_migrate_legacy_foundry_tasks() {

1097:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_TASK_ROOT" "todo"
1098:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_TASK_ROOT" "in-progress"
1099:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_TASK_ROOT" "done"
1100:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_TASK_ROOT" "failed"
1101:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_TASK_ROOT" "suspended"
1102:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_QUEUE_ROOT" "todo"
1103:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_QUEUE_ROOT" "in-progress"
1104:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_QUEUE_ROOT" "done"
1105:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_QUEUE_ROOT" "failed"
1106:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_QUEUE_ROOT" "suspended"
1107:   foundry_migrate_legacy_state "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_QUEUE_ROOT" "archive"
1108:   foundry_migrate_legacy_artifacts "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_TASK_ROOT"
1109:   foundry_migrate_legacy_artifacts "$LEGACY_FOUNDRY_QUEUE_ROOT"
1110: }

1124: # ── Zombie process cleanup ───────────────────────────────────────────
1125: # Finds and cleans up zombie .opencode processes and stale batch lock.
1126: # Returns number of zombies cleaned.
1127: foundry_cleanup_zombies() {
1128:   local cleaned=0
1129: 
1130:   # 1. Find zombie .opencode processes (state Z)
1131:   local zombie_pids
1132:   zombie_pids=$(ps -eo pid,stat,comm 2>/dev/null \
1133:     | awk '$2 ~ /^Z/ && $3 ~ /opencode/ {print $1}' || true)
1134: 
1135:   if [[ -n "$zombie_pids" ]]; then
1136:     local count
1137:     count=$(echo "$zombie_pids" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
1138:     cleaned=$((cleaned + count))
1139:     # Zombies can't be killed directly — their parent must reap them.
1140:     # We can only log them; the OS will clean them when parent exits.
1141:   fi
1142: 
1143:   # 2. Check and clean stale batch lock
1144:   local lockfile="${REPO_ROOT}/.opencode/pipeline/.batch.lock"

1164: foundry_process_status() {

1183:                 if line.startswith("State:"):

1186:         result["lock"] = {"pid": pid, "state": state, "zombie": state == "Z"}

1197:         parts = line.split(None, 3)
1198:         if len(parts) < 4:
1199:             continue
1200:         pid, stat, etime, args = parts
1201:         if "foundry" in args or "opencode" in args.lower():
1202:             is_zombie = stat.startswith("Z")

1204:                 "pid": int(pid),
1205:                 "stat": stat,
1206:                 "etime": etime,
1207:                 "args": args[:80],
1208:                 "zombie": is_zombie,
1209:                 "log": None,

1212:             if log_dir.exists():

1214:                 if logs:
1215:                     entry["log"] = str(logs[0])
1216:             if is_zombie:
1217:                 result["zombies"].append(entry)

1220: except Exception:

1223: print(json.dumps(result))

then 2930: cp "$HANDOFF_FILE" "$LOG_DIR/${TIMESTAMP}_handoff.md" 2>/dev/null || true 2931: fi 2932: 2933: # Task file lifecycle: finalize BEFORE push/PR so task never stays in_progress 2934: if $failed; then 2935: _task_move_to_failed "$branch" "$total_duration" 2936: else 2937: _task_move_to_done "$branch" "$total_duration" 2938: fi 2939: 2940: # Create Pull Request (only on success and if we have a summary) 2941: # This is best-effort — task is already marked completed/failed above 2942: if ! $failed && [[ -n "$branch" && "$branch" != "main" ]]; then 2943: echo -e "${BLUE}Creating Pull Request...${NC}" 2944: local pr_title pr_body pr_url 2945: pr_title=$(echo "$TASK_MESSAGE" | head -1 | sed 's/^#\+ *//' | sed 's/^//' | xargs | cut -c1-70) 2946: 2947: if [[ -f "$TASK_SUMMARY_FILE" ]]; then 2948: pr_body=$(cat "$TASK_SUMMARY_FILE") 2949: else 2950: pr_body="Pipeline completed for: ${TASK_MESSAGE}" 2951: fi 2952: 2953: # Push branch to remote (timeout prevents indefinite hangs) 2954: if timeout 60 git -C "$REPO_ROOT" push -u origin "$branch" 2>/dev/null; then 2955: pr_url=$(timeout 30 gh pr create \ 2956: --base main \ 2957: --head "$branch" \ 2958: --title "[pipeline] ${pr_title}" \ 2959: --body "$pr_body" 2>/dev/null || true) 2960: 2961: if [[ -n "$pr_url" ]];
